scripts.build: esbuild js/data.js js/store.js js/ui.js js/dialogs.js js/settings.js js/cards.js js/app.js js/main.js --loader:.js=jsx --outdir=dist --platform=browser
scripts.watch: esbuild js/data.js js/store.js js/ui.js js/dialogs.js js/settings.js js/cards.js js/app.js js/main.js --loader:.js=jsx --outdir=dist --platform=browser --watch
